description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck, topped with a white cap. The bottle features a prominent blue label that wraps around its midsection, with the front displaying the text 'Golden Coast Brewing' in yellow and an illustration of a barrel and waves. The label also includes decorative white graphics and a barcode on the back, along with additional product information in small text. The bottle's surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glass beverage containers. The cap is flat and opaque, likely made of metal or plastic. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the bottle.
description: A brown glass bottle with a white cap and a blue 'Golden Coast Brewing' label featuring a barrel illustration and product details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the blue label's product information, barcode, and part of the decorative graphics.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main 'Golden Coast Brewing' logo, barrel illustration, and decorative white graphics on the blue label.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the transition between the front logo and the side label details.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the label's text, barcode, and the yellow 'Golden Coast' text at the bottom.
attribute_label_or_branding: Blue label with yellow 'Golden Coast Brewing' text, a barrel and wave illustration, white decorative graphics, and a barcode on the back.
